---
name: Bad verdict report
about: Report a qualification verdict that appears miscalibrated
title: "Bad verdict: "
labels: calibration
assignees: ""
---

## Verdict produced

Build now / Validate first / Park / No-go

## What seemed wrong

Name the scoring dimension, gate, or reasoning step that appears
miscalibrated.

## What happened in reality

Describe the real-world signal that contradicted the verdict. You can
abstract the idea if it is private.

## Suggested calibration

What should the framework ask, score, or verify differently next time?
